name: python3-pick
title: python3-pick
summary: library to help you create curses (Python 3)
description:
library to help you create curses (Python 3)
This package contains a small python library to help you create curses based
interactive selection list in the terminal.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pick because library to help you create curses (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pick as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pick with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pick --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
